name: Frame Extrapolation
description: Smooths gameplay by predicting player position between physics ticks.

enabled.name: Enable Frame Extrapolation
enabled.description: Master toggle. Smooths between frames by predicting where the player will be using its velocity.

extrapolate-camera.name: Extrapolate Camera
extrapolate-camera.description: Smooths the camera position between physics ticks.

extrapolate-player.name: Extrapolate Player
extrapolate-player.description: Smooths player position and rotation between physics ticks.

extrapolate-ground.name: Extrapolate Ground
extrapolate-ground.description: Smooths ground layer scrolling between physics ticks.

disable-in-practice.name: Disable in Practice Mode
disable-in-practice.description: Turns off extrapolation during practice mode.

max-percent.name: Max Extrapolation Percent
max-percent.description: Caps how far ahead the mod can predict. Lower is safer, higher is smoother during lag spikes.
